title: Fly The Sky's Together: Adventure Of Dragons
description: A Modpack That Is Ready For The Release Of New Berks Dawn Mod That Adds Dragons From HTTYD
body:
This is the **Fly The Sky's Together** modpack, which is ready for the release of the New Berk's Dawn mod. Currently, it utilizes the Isle of Berk, but once New Berks Dawn is released, it will be replaced.

This modpack also includes the Create mod, allowing for the construction of doors similar to those seen in "How to Train Your Dragon 2." While it may not perfectly match the HTTYD theme, it remains a valuable addition.

The custom panorama is provided by a user on Planet Minecraft named [PrimeBee2812](https://www.planetminecraft.com/member/primebee2812), who has granted me permission to use their map as my panorama. Thank you, PrimeBee2812!

For more information, you can join the New Berks Dawn Discord here: [New Berks Dawn Discord](https://discord.gg/new-berks-dawn-official)

**Please be aware that once we switch from the Isle of Berk mod to New Berks Dawn, there is a possibility that your dragons may be deleted.**
